team_news.notes: Haiti report a fully fit squad with no injury concerns ahead of their first World Cup match in 52 years. Scotland are without key midfielder Billy Gilmour (knee injury, tournament-ending), while Scott McTominay (illness) and Scott McKenna (knock) were late doubts but both are expected to start; Tommy Conway also misses out with an ankle problem.

Wilson Isidor (co-striker / Premier League experience, Sunderland)
Jean-Ricner Bellegarde (attacking midfielder / midfield fulcrum, set-piece threa
away_scorers: Scott McTominay (attacking midfielder / 15 international goals, clinical in box)
Lawrence Shankland (striker / first-choice starter in 4-4-2)
John McGinn (wide midfielder / set-piece threat, experienced campaigner)

news_adjustment.notes: Haiti report a fully fit squad with no injury concerns ahead of their first World Cup match in 52 years. Scotland are without key midfielder Billy Gilmour (knee injury, tournament-ending), while Scott McTominay (illness) and Scott McKenna (knock) were late doubts but both are expected to start; Tommy Conway also misses out with an ankle problem.

team_news.notes: Australia head into the match with a fully fit 26-man squad — no injuries or suspensions reported — while Turkey are significantly disrupted: Kenan Yildiz (calf) is confirmed on the bench/rested, Hakan Calhanoglu is managing a calf issue and not expected to complete 90 minutes, and Ferdi Kadioglu only recently returned to full training after an undisclosed injury setback.

news_adjustment.notes: Australia head into the match with a fully fit 26-man squad — no injuries or suspensions reported — while Turkey are significantly disrupted: Kenan Yildiz (calf) is confirmed on the bench/rested, Hakan Calhanoglu is managing a calf issue and not expected to complete 90 minutes, and Ferdi Kadioglu only recently returned to full training after an undisclosed injury setback.

team_news.notes: Germany are without confirmed absentees Serge Gnabry (adductor tear), Lennart Karl (torn muscle, replaced by Ouédraogo), Ridle Baku, and Jonathan Burkardt (all injured), while Manuel Neuer carries a calf concern but is expected to start; Curaçao are close to full strength with only Riechedly Bazoer ruled out through injury.

news_adjustment.notes: Germany are without confirmed absentees Serge Gnabry (adductor tear), Lennart Karl (torn muscle, replaced by Ouédraogo), Ridle Baku, and Jonathan Burkardt (all injured), while Manuel Neuer carries a calf concern but is expected to start; Curaçao are close to full strength with only Riechedly Bazoer ruled out through injury.

team_news.notes: Ivory Coast are without key defensive pillar Evan Ndicka (fitness concern ruled out of opener), with Odilon Kossounou stepping in, and there is a striker rotation battle between Guessand, Wahi, and Bonny. Ecuador's talismanic captain Enner Valencia — their only player with a double-figure international goal tally — is a minor fitness doubt ahead of kick-off, though he is expected to start; Kendry Paez is also nursing a knock but likely to play.
home_scorers: Amad Diallo (dangerous winger, top creator in recent friendlies incl. vs France)
Evann Guessand (first-choice striker, leading the line in predicted XIs)

Gonzalo Plata (second-highest scorer in squad on 8 goals, dangerous wide forward
Moises Caicedo (engine of midfield, drives into box, key creative force)

team_news.notes: Netherlands are without Jurriën Timber (groin, ruled out of tournament), Matthijs de Ligt (back surgery), Xavi Simons (injury, not called up), and Jerdy Schouten (ACL); GK Bart Verbruggen is a major doubt after a bruised hip in the Uzbekistan warm-up, with Memphis Depay also carrying a hamstring issue and likely to start on the bench. Japan have suffered devastating pre-tournament blows: captain Wataru Endo (foot surgery, retired from internationals), star winger Kaoru Mitoma (hamstring), and…

team_news.notes: Sweden are near full-strength but missing Dejan Kulusevski (long-term knee injury, out of the tournament entirely) and Gabriel Gudmundsson was a late doubt due to illness but cleared to start; Isak returned from a broken leg and is fit alongside Gyökeres. Tunisia's key creative player Hannibal Mejbri was a significant doubt for the opener after picking up an injury in a pre-tournament friendly against Austria, with his fitness closely monitored right up to kickoff.

team_news.notes: Belgium's Zeno Debast is ruled out with injury and Romelu Lukaku starts on the bench after a season hampered by a long-term hamstring problem, with Charles De Ketelaere leading the attack; Egypt's Mohamed Salah recovered from an April hamstring injury in time to start, but fitness concerns lingered heading into the match.

news_adjustment.notes: Belgium's Zeno Debast is ruled out with injury and Romelu Lukaku starts on the bench after a season hampered by a long-term hamstring problem, with Charles De Ketelaere leading the attack; Egypt's Mohamed Salah recovered from an April hamstring injury in time to start, but fitness concerns lingered heading into the match.

team_news.notes: Spain start without injured Fermín López (fractured metatarsal, tournament miss) and begin Lamine Yamal & Nico Williams on the bench after hamstring recoveries, with Víctor Muñoz also a late doubt (muscular overload); De la Fuente opted to rotate the wingers in as impact subs. Cape Verde have no reported injuries or suspensions and field a full squad.

away_scorers: Ryan Mendes (experienced winger, Cape Verde's primary attacking outlet)
Garry Rodrigues (forward/wide, top scorer in qualification)
Jamiro Monteiro (attacking midfielder, set-piece and long-range threat)

news_adjustment.notes: Spain start without injured Fermín López (fractured metatarsal, tournament miss) and begin Lamine Yamal & Nico Williams on the bench after hamstring recoveries, with Víctor Muñoz also a late doubt (muscular overload); De la Fuente opted to rotate the wingers in as impact subs. Cape Verde have no reported injuries or suspensions and field a full squad.

team_news.notes: Saudi Arabia are near full strength with only Nawaf Al-Aqidi (muscle) confirmed out and coach Donis reporting a largely healthy squad; Salem Al-Dawsari leads the line as captain. Uruguay face a severe defensive injury crisis: Ronald Araujo is effectively ruled out (calf), Jose Gimenez is a major doubt (ankle), Matias Vina is managing a muscle issue, and de Arrascaeta carries a minor knock — forcing Bielsa into significant defensive reshuffling.
home_scorers: Salem Al-Dawsari (captain, leading scorer with 34 international goals, primary c
Firas Al-Buraikan (expected starting striker, 16 goals in 72 caps)
Musab Al-Juwayr (attacking midfielder, set-piece and counter-attack threat)
away_scorers: Darwin Nunez (starting striker, primary goal threat for Uruguay)
Federico Valverde (midfield engine, drives forward, key attacking force)
Maximiliano Araujoo (wide attacker, direct and dangerous on the break)

news_adjustment.notes: Saudi Arabia are near full strength with only Nawaf Al-Aqidi (muscle) confirmed out and coach Donis reporting a largely healthy squad; Salem Al-Dawsari leads the line as captain. Uruguay face a severe defensive injury crisis: Ronald Araujo is effectively ruled out (calf), Jose Gimenez is a major doubt (ankle), Matias Vina is managing a muscle issue, and de Arrascaeta carries a minor knock — forcing Bielsa into significant defensive reshuffling.
